params.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import subprocess
import sys

# 尝试使用Playwright无头浏览器访问网页并截图
try:
    # 首先检查Playwright是否已安装
    import playwright
    print("Playwright已安装，使用Playwright获取截图")
    from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
    
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080})
        page.goto("https://chowduck.cn", wait_until="networkidle", timeout=30000)
        page.screenshot(path="/tmp/chowduck_final.png")
        browser.close()
    
    print("截图成功: /tmp/chowduck_final.png")
    
except ImportError:
    print("Playwright未安装，尝试使用Selenium")
    try:
        from selenium import webdriver
        from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
        import time
        
        options = webdriver.ChromeOptions()
        options.add_argument('--headless')
        options.add_argument('--window-size=1920,1080')
        driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=options)
        driver.get("https://chowduck.cn")
        time.sleep(3)
        driver.save_screenshot("/tmp/chowduck_final.png")
        driver.quit()
        
        print("截图成功: /tmp/chowduck_final.png")
        
    except ImportError:
        print("Selenium也未安装，尝试使用html2image库")
        try:
            from html2image import HtmlImage
            hti = HtmlImage()
            hti.screenshot(url="https://chowduck.cn", save_as="chowduck_final.png", size=(1920, 1080))
            print("截图成功: /tmp/chowduck_final.png")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"html2image失败: {e}")
            # 如果都失败，返回已有的截图
            print("使用之前保存的截图: /tmp/chowduck_webpage.png")
